raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. un Gadda Dehli : Zivi-\
ons/ un Aggajus / Sunus / Ez-\
ons/ Erus un Arodus / un A-\
elub.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "17. Un Ahsera Dehli : Jem-\
us/ un Jischwus/ un Jiswi/\
n Brus/un Sera winno Mah-\
Un Brus Dehli/ Ebers/ un \
alkiels.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "18. Schee irr Silpas Behrni/\
Lahbans Leai+awai Meitai bij \
wis/ un ta dsemdeja Jehkabum \
ahs feſchpadeſnits Dwehfeles.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "19. Raëles/ Jehkaba Seewas \
ehli bija : Jahseps / un Ben-\
mins.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Un Jahsepain dsimme E-\
otes-Semunê / Manassius un \
wrains / ko winnam dsemide-\
Afnata Potiwera/ ta augsta \
nga Meita no Onna.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "21. Un Benjaminia Dehli: Be-\
un Bekers/un Asbels/ Gerus/\
Nääinans / Efius / un Ros/\
upims / un Upims / un Ards.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "22. Schee irr Raëles Dehli/\
Jehkabam irr peedsummuschi/\
fi kohpá tschetrpadeſmits \
vehfeles.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "23. Dana Dehli : Usuns.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "24. Un Nawtata Dehli : Ja-\
is/ un Gunus/ un Gezers/ un \
lleens.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "25. Schee irr Villas Dehli/\
Lahbans tawai Meitai Raëlei \
we/ un ta dsemdeja schohs Jeh-\
batn / wiſſi kohpá bija ſeptin \
wehfeles.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "26. Wiffas Dwehfeles / kas \
ar Jehkabu uhs Egiptes-Semini \
nahze / is winna Gurneim zeh-\
lufchas/ bes Jehkaba Dehlu See-\
wahn / wiffas Dwehfeles feſch-\
definits un feſch.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "27. Un Jahsepa Dehli / kas \
winnam Egiptes-Semmê dsim-\
muschi / bija diwi Dwehfeles/\
wiffas Dwehteles Jehkaba Nam-\
má / kas uhs Egiptes-Semmi \
nahze/ bija ſeptindefinits.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "28. Un winſch fuhtija Judu \
fawa Preekſcha pee Jahsepa / ka \
tas preekſch winna tam eerahdi-\
tu Gosena Semmii / un tee nah-\
ze Gosena Semmê.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "29. Tad eejuhdse Jahseps sa-\
wus Rattus / un gahje sawam \
Tehwam Israëlampretti uhs Go-\
senu/ un winnu eerandſiis/ met-\
tehs tas apkahrt winna Kaklu /\
un randaja ilgi pee winna Kakla.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "30. Un Israëls fazzija uhs \
Jahsepu: Nu man labpracht grih-\
bahs mirt/ pehz ka es tawu Wat-\
gu esmu redſejs / ka tu weh \
dsihws effi.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "31. Un Jahseps fazzija us fa-\
weein Brahkeem / un us sawa \
Tehwa Namunu : Es no-eefchu/\
un pasazzischu Waraüm/ un faz-\
zischu us to : Manni Brahti/un \
manna Tehwa Nams / kas eeksch \
Kanaïna Semmes btja / irr pee \
man nahkuschi.\n"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "32. Un tee Wihri irr Awju-\
Ganni / jo tee irr Wihri / kas ar \
Lohpeem tinnahs / un teem irr \
fawi fhki Lohpi / un sawi Wehr-\
fchi/\n"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
